root_text.an4.1:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā vajjīsu viharati bhaṇḍagāme.
root_text.an4.1:2.1: “Catunnaṁ, bhikkhave, dhammānaṁ ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca.
root_text.an4.1:2.3: Ariyassa, bhikkhave, sīlassa ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca.
root_text.an4.1:2.4: Ariyassa, bhikkhave, samādhissa ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca.
root_text.an4.1:2.5: Ariyāya, bhikkhave, paññāya ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca.
root_text.an4.1:2.6: Ariyāya, bhikkhave, vimuttiyā ananubodhā appaṭivedhā evamidaṁ dīghamaddhānaṁ sandhāvitaṁ saṁsaritaṁ mamañceva tumhākañca.
root_text.an4.1:2.7: Tayidaṁ, bhikkhave, ariyaṁ sīlaṁ anubuddhaṁ paṭividdhaṁ, ariyo samādhi anubuddho paṭividdho, ariyā paññā anubuddhā paṭividdhā, ariyā vimutti anubuddhā paṭividdhā, ucchinnā bhavataṇhā, khīṇā bhavanetti, natthi dāni punabbhavo”ti.
root_text.an4.1:3.2: Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā:

translation_text.an4.1:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying in the land of the Vajjis at Wares Village.
translation_text.an4.1:1.3: There the Buddha addressed the mendicants,
translation_text.an4.1:2.1: “Mendicants, due to not understanding and not penetrating four things, both you and I have wandered and transmigrated for such a very long time.
translation_text.an4.1:2.7: These noble ethics, immersion, wisdom, and freedom have been understood and comprehended. Craving for continued existence has been cut off; the leash to existence is ended; now there’ll be no more future lives.”
translation_text.an4.1:3.1: That is what the Buddha said.
translation_text.an4.1:3.2: Then the Holy One, the Teacher, went on to say:
translation_text.an4.1:5.1: And so the Buddha, having insight,
translation_text.an4.1:5.2: explained this teaching to the mendicants.
translation_text.an4.1:5.3: The teacher made an end of suffering,
translation_text.an4.1:5.4: seeing clearly, he is fully quenched.”

reference_text.an4.1:1.1: bj19.2, cck21.1, csp1ed15.307, csp2ed15.307, dr21.1, ms15A4_2, msdiv1, ndp17.3, pts-vp-pli2.1, sya21.1, vri36.1
